name: gym-management-system
description: Gym Management System - Hybrid DApp with Ethereum Blockchain Integration

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install && cd ../contracts && npm install
scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend && npm run test:contracts
scripts.deploy:contracts: cd contracts && npx hardhat run scripts/deploy.js --network sepolia
scripts.lint: npm run lint:backend && npm run lint:frontend
scripts.clean: rm -rf node_modules backend/node_modules frontend/node_modules contracts/node_modules && rm -rf dist build artifacts cache coverage

author: Ujwal Pathak (02650380)
